title: Sharpened Swords
description: This Mod Adds lots of unique and never before seen swords to the game. If you have any feedback, suggestions, or questions, join my discord.
body: Hello. This mod is no-longer going to be updated however, I am currently working on making a full replacement for it thatll be better and always updated. I hope you have enjoyed this mod and there is definitely more to come in the future!
